description: Range-of-motion variation facet (§6.3). Spec examples (full, partial, deficit) plus lengthened-partial — the long-muscle-length partial that is a current hypertrophy trend (METHODOLOGY-VALIDATION G2/trending).

tokens.label: Lengthened Partial
tokens.description: A partial performed at the long-muscle-length (stretched) portion of the range.

tokens.label: Shortened Partial
tokens.description: A partial at the short-muscle-length portion.

tokens.label: Deficit
tokens.description: Extended range below normal (e.g. deficit deadlift).

tokens.label: Elevated / Reduced
tokens.description: Reduced range from an elevated start (e.g. block pull, board press).

tokens.label: Paused
tokens.description: Full range with an enforced pause (also expressible via phasePattern).
